title: Disabling server-side encryption of S3 buckets is security sensitive
description: Ensures that AWS S3 buckets are not configured to use no encryption or client-side encryption for their data.
message: Server-side encryption for AWS S3 buckets is not enabled.
impact: Data at rest on S3 buckets may be vulnerable to unauthorized access or reading.
recommendation: Enable server-side encryption for S3 buckets.

noncompliant.description: Creates a bucket with no encryption configuration.

compliant.description: Creates a bucket with server-side encryption enabled.

why_is_this_an_issue: Data in S3 buckets is vulnerable to unauthorized access or reading when not encrypted.
how_to_fix: Enable server-side encryption for S3 buckets.
